title: Rental Deposit Assistance * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Rental Deposit Assistance * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Laborers AIDS/HIV Families with Children Foster Children Homeless Veterans Homeless Youth Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Medicaid Recipients Native American Community * Homelessness Issues Older Adults Pregnant Individuals Slavic Community Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTHWEST PILOT PROJECT RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eviction prevention (includes rental assistance if future income can be verified and subject to availability), relocation, and deposit assistance for older adults. Assistance is limited due to the availability of funding and is not guaranteed. Households can receive assistance once every two years. 1430 SW Broadway Suite 200 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: -Household must contain one member at least 55 years old -Household must reside in Multnomah County or be homeless -Household must not contain any minor children under 18 years old -Household not currently in subsidized or Section 8 housing -Household must have a plan for resuming rent payments and not owe more than 2 months of past due rent -Household must meet income requirements; priority for those making 20% Median Family Income (MFI) or below Focus is on serving older adults with health concerns or disabilities or who have very low income, language barriers, no support system, or other barriers to housing Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 227-5605 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST PILOT PROJECT RENTAL ASSISTANCE
